items.title: Ally Invest $200 Bonus With $1,000 Deposit For 90 Days (Nationwide; New Customers Only)

items.summary_zh: Ally Invest 提供新客戶存款 $1,000 並持有 90 天即可獲得 $200 獎金的優惠。
items.title_es: Bono de $200 de Ally Invest con Depósito de $1,000 por 90 Días (Nacional; Solo Nuevos Clientes)
